reviews.comment:
Los playeros exelente atención, en la tienda un sándwich de suprema con j/q (viejo, seco, tenía varios dias) $ 750, se pasan de vivos...sigan tratando así al viajero!

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff provided excellent service. At the store, a supreme sandwich with j/q (old, dry, several days old) was $750. They're really smart...keep treating travelers like that!

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio y el personal  que suministra combustibles muy bien...pero el personal de de cafetería y kiosco UN DESASTRE..que poca ganas de trabajar! Y como se acumula gente .se enojan  Ya no era lo que yo vi hace 4 años  sus famosos sanguche de pan integral de crudo y queso  y la cafeteria YA NO EXISTE   ahora es una pobruche puesto de gente que no sabe atender a la gente...

(Translated by Google)
The gas station and the staff who pump fuel are great... but the cafeteria and kiosk staff are a disaster! They have so little desire to work! And when people gather, they get angry. It's not what I saw four years ago; their famous wholemeal ham and cheese sandwiches and the cafeteria are gone. Now it's a pathetic little stand run by people who don't know how to serve customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdmNiUjh3RRAB
